memberdef.argsstring: (const base::Buffer &buff, std::string topic, boost::optional< libp2p::peer::PeerInfo > peerInfo=boost::none) override
memberdef.name: Broadcast

briefdescription.para: Sends the given buffer as a broadcast to peers.

parameterdescription.para: Buffer containing the data to broadcast.
Optional peer info to avoid repeated GetPeerInfo calls.

simplesect.para: outcome::success on successful publish, or outcome::failure on error.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the next incoming broadcast payload.

simplesect.para: buffer value or outcome::failure on error

briefdescription.para: Subscribes to all configured topics and starts message processing. Must be called before using Next() to receive incoming messages.

simplesect.para: Ensures message processing is ready before any CRDT operations run.

briefdescription.para: Adds a new topic by name.

parameterdescription.para: Name of the topic to add.

simplesect.para: outcome::success() on success (or if topic already existed), outcome::failure() on error.

briefdescription.para: Subscribe to a given topic and store its future.

parameterdescription.para: Name of the topic to listen to.

briefdescription.para: Checks whether the given topic is already registered.

parameterdescription.para: Name of the topic to check.

simplesect.para: True if the topic exists, false otherwise.
Shared pointer to the GraphsyncDAGSyncer (as void pointer).

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::string &cid, const std::string peer_id, const std::string address)
memberdef.name: AddSingleCIDInfo

briefdescription.para: Factory method to create a broadcaster for multiple topics.

parameterdescription.para: Graphsync DAG syncer for block exchange.
PubSub instance used to subscribe and publish.

simplesect.para: Shared pointer to the new PubSubBroadcasterExt.

briefdescription.para: Private constructor initializing members with provided topics and syncer.

parameterdescription.para: PubSub instance used to subscribe and publish.

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::vector< CID > &cids, const libp2p::peer::PeerId &peer_id, const std::vector< libp2p::multi::Multiaddress > &addr_vector)
memberdef.name: AddMultiCIDInfo

briefdescription.para: Extended PubSub broadcaster that integrates with a CRDT datastore and Graphsync DAG syncer.

detaileddescription.para: Manages multiple gossip topics, broadcasting messages and processing incoming payloads.

node.label: std::map< CID, std::pair< std::shared_ptr< ipfs_lite::ipld::IPLDNode >, std::list< CID >::iterator > >

childnode.edgelabel: < CID, std::pair< std::shared_ptr< ipfs_lite::ipld::IPLDNode >, std::list< CID >::iterator > >

node.label: std::map< CID, std::tuple< std::shared_ptr< Subscription >, std::shared_ptr< std::promise< std::shared_ptr< ipfs_lite::ipld::IPLDNode > > > > >

childnode.edgelabel: < CID, std::tuple< std::shared_ptr< Subscription >, std::shared_ptr< std::promise< std::shared_ptr< ipfs_lite::ipld::IPLDNode > > > > >
